perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a bright title screen featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and large text "Haoshihui" overlaid on a busy warehouse store background. (2) A rapid montage begins, showcasing a wide variety of grocery items on shelves and in refrigerated cases: raw chicken, beef rib, paper towels, laundry detergent, and various snacks. (3) The fast-paced cuts continue through aisles of cookies, crackers, chocolate, dried seafood, cereal, and dairy products. (4) The final section features household cleaning tools, coffee beans, milk, frozen snacks, sausages, and ends with canned alcoholic beverages and beer, all filmed with a steady POV camera moving through the store.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic, upbeat electronic BGM with a fast tempo plays continuously. (2) A male narrator speaks with a high-pitched, excited tone, rapidly listing the names of products and their discounted prices as they appear on screen. (3) Occasional faint ambient warehouse noise and movement sounds are heard between the rapid-fire narration. (4) The audio maintains a consistent high-energy production style until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "COSTCO WHOLESALE 連假完超殺特價 好市多 每週特價速報 10/13-10/19 記得追蹤我們" (Hook: Weekly special report). (2) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles for every product shown, including "台灣雞清胸肉 (Taiwan Chicken Breast)", "美國特選冷凍肩小排烤片 (US Choice Beef Rib)", and specific price breakdowns like "原價215/KG -45 特價170/KG". (3) Decorative Text: Brand names like "ARIEL", "HI-CHEW", "RITZ", "KITKAT", and "STARBUCKS" appear as part of the product descriptions.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple shoppers visible in the background aisles and checkout areas; narrator is off-camera.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse with high ceilings, industrial shelving, large pallets of stock, and shoppers pushing carts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Catalog of Deals -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive weekly update on product discounts at Costco Taiwan to help shoppers plan their purchases.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed price reduction information and showcasing of specific brands available at Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-talking narration style combined with rapid price-comparison text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High-efficiency information delivery designed for quick consumption on social media platforms.
